svg.title: Mini Blinky fetch spine and literal fan-out
svg.desc: NEXTPC mux feeds PC, I-mem, IR. IR splits into opcode to the decode GALs and a literal nibble that feeds the NEXTPC mux as branch target, the TOS mux, the D-memory address, and the I/O address mux. Flags feed the GALs; PCSEL returns to the NEXTPC mux. PC+1 loops back and also goes to the return stack on CALL.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the NEXTPC mux and PCSEL in Mini Blinky')
sendPrompt('Explain the Mini Blinky program counter')
sendPrompt('Explain the Mini Blinky instruction register split')
sendPrompt('Explain the four-GAL decode partition in Mini Blinky')
sendPrompt('Explain Mini Blinky D-memory addressing and the DMEM_CS DMEM_WE strobes')
sendPrompt('Explain the Mini Blinky I/O address mux')
